name: Job Market Trust Infrastructure Model
author: Market Catalyst - Job Market
description: Job Market Trust Infrastructure: structured hiring transparency, promises, reviews, and verification.

entities.name: review
entities.brief: Yelp-style structured review of hiring experience
entities.description:
Structured, verifiable reviews of hiring experiences. These are not free-text
reviews but structured data points that can be cross-verified. Based on
three dimensions: Transparency (were promises kept?), Experiential Respect
(was humanity honored?), and Time Efficiency (was effort proportional to outcome?).
These reviews feed into all interface views: Trust Stock Market, Google Maps,
Wikipedia, and Simple Signals.

fields.name: company_id
fields.description: Reference to the company being reviewed

fields.name: application_id
fields.description: Reference to the application this review is based on

fields.name: transparency_score
fields.description: Transparency score (1-5): Were promises kept? Were timelines accurate?

fields.name: respect_score
fields.description: Experiential respect score (1-5): Was humanity honored? Was communication respectful?

fields.name: efficiency_score
fields.description: Time efficiency score (1-5): Was effort proportional to outcome?

fields.name: overall_score
fields.description: Overall score (average of transparency, respect, and efficiency scores, computed at application layer)

fields.name: was_ghosted
fields.description: Whether the applicant was ghosted (no response after engagement)

fields.name: offer_pct_below
fields.description: Percentage below advertised minimum (computed from offer_salary vs advertised range, if applicable)

fields.name: go_nogo_signal
fields.description: Simple go/no-go signal for quick decision making

fields.name: verification
fields.description: Verification data for this review (nested children)
